Sui Agentathon 2026

An operating system for on-chain AI agents.

◆

⬙

Deploy autonomous agents with Sui wallets, verifiable execution via Walrus, and programmable guardrails. One click.

Deploy an agent →
7
Sui primitives in every agent's stack
01

Three autonomous strategies.
One transaction block.

I

Yield Agent

Scans DeepBook pools for optimal APR. Rebalances daily when edge exceeds 2%. Auto-compounds rewards. Max 50% single-pool exposure. Programmable guardrails enforced on-chain.

II

Trader Agent

Arbitrage across DeepBook Spot and Margin order books. Stop-loss at 5%, take-profit at 10%. Whitelisted trading pairs via on-chain guardrails. 0.5% minimum profit threshold after fees.

III

Prediction Agent

Trades DeepBook Predict markets using Kelly criterion sizing. Only bets when model edge exceeds 5% over market-implied probability. 60% minimum confidence threshold. First framework building on Predict since May 2026.

DEEPBOOK · SPOT · MARGIN · PREDICT · DEEPBOOK · SPOT · MARGIN · PREDICT ·
02

How an agent
thinks.

01

Fetch State Sui RPC

Agent queries Sui testnet for live pool APRs, order book spreads, and prediction market odds. Real on-chain data only.

02

LLM Reason Groq · Llama 3.3 70B

State is sent to Groq with the agent's strategy prompt. The LLM returns a structured JSON decision — which pool, how much, at what confidence.

03

Guardrail Check On-Chain

Decision validated against programmable guardrails: max TX value, daily spend limit, allowed action types. Blocked actions are logged, never executed.

04

Execute Sponsored TX

Valid decisions are packaged into a Programmable Transaction Block and submitted. Gas is sponsored — the agent pays nothing.

05

Log to Walrus Immutable

Every decision — action, reasoning, hash, timestamp — is uploaded to Walrus as a content-addressed blob. Verifiable, tamper-proof, permanent.

Every agent decision is a shard of verifiable execution. Walrus binds them together.
03

Deploy an agent.
One click.

Guardrail enforcement
max_tx_value 100 SUI
daily_spend_limit 500 SUI
allowed_actions swap, stake, lp_deposit
stop_loss 5%
Verifiability
execution_logs Walrus blob
model_configs Walrus blob
private_keys Seal encrypted
identity zkLogin (Google OAuth)
04

Seven primitives.
Every agent.

Walrus

Content-addressed blobs for agent memory, execution logs, model configs. Immutable, verifiable audit trail.

Seal

Encrypted agent state and private keys at rest. Agents hold funds without exposing keys on-chain.

DeepBook

Shared liquidity across Spot, Margin, Predict. Agents trade via unified interface. First framework building on Predict.

zkLogin

Google OAuth derives a Sui address. No seed phrase. No wallet extension. Agent identity tied to a real user.

Sponsored TXs

Gasless agent execution. Agents operate autonomously without holding SUI for gas.

Programmable TX Blocks

Multi-step strategies in one atomic transaction. No partial execution. No MEV exposure between steps.

Google AP2

Agent-to-agent payments on Sui. Google's launch partner for the AP2 protocol. Machines transact with machines.

Contracts agent_registry.move agent_wallet.move agent_factory.move action_log.move
Runtime llm.py · Groq sui_client.py · RPC walrus_client.py · Logs api.py · SSE Stream
Agents yield_agent.py trader_agent.py prediction_agent.py event_bus.py
